entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Community Day — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Frigibax Community Day Community Day Starts: Saturday, June 20, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time Ends: Saturday, June 20, 2026, at 5:00 PM Local Time

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Incense — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Shiny Frigibax will be available! Trainers will have an increased chance of encountering Shiny Frigibax during Community Day.

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: From 2:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time , Frigibax will have a very high chance of appearing at PokeStops with active regular Lure Modules.

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Frigibax attracted to regular Lure Modules will still have an increased chance to be Shiny and may have a Special Background. That's more chances to encounter the featured Pokemon even after the event hours!

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Raids — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Take a few snapshots during Community Day for a surprise! During the event you can snap an AR Photo and get photobombed by Frigibax.

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Field Research — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: June Community Day-themed Field Research will be available! Catch Frigibax to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Frigibax, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Frigibax that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Field Research — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: June Community Day-themed Field Research will be available! Catch Frigibax to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Frigibax, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Frigibax that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Special Research — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: 3 encounters with Frigibax that have a Special Background (at the end of each page)

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Frigibax will appear more frequently in the wild.

entries.name: Frigibax
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Frigibax will appear more frequently in the wild.
